name: Cauliflower & Green Pea Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the cauliflower and peas until they are barely tender.
2. Drain well and transfer to a bowl while still warm.
3. Pour chicken broth over the vegetables and set aside to cool.
4. In a separate bowl, finely chop celery and mix in with scallions, parsley, red bell pepper, balsamic vinegar, and Dijon mustard.
5. Add sour cream, salt, and white pepper; stir until combined.
6. Gently toss the dressing mixture with the cauliflower and peas, adding ham if using.
7. Sprinkle chopped chives over the salad before serving.
